description_long: This is a rustic wooden handcart with a rectangular cargo bed, reinforced by vertical and horizontal planks along the sides and back. The cart features two large spoked wheels made of wood with metal rims, providing stability and ease of movement. At the front, two long wooden handles extend outward, designed for manual pulling or pushing. The load platform is flat and solid, bordered by sturdy side rails and a higher rear panel to prevent items from falling out. The wood appears weathered, giving the cart a vintage, utilitarian look suitable for transporting goods in urban or park settings. Metal fasteners and brackets are visible at the joints, adding structural integrity to the overall design.
description: A vintage wooden handcart with large spoked wheels, side rails, and long front handles, designed for manual transport of goods. The cart has a flat, solid load platform and a weathered, rustic appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cart, both wheels, side rails, and the extended handles.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two parallel handles and the open cargo bed, with the wheels partially visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the wheels, side rails, and handles from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the high back panel, the open cargo area, and the wheels from behind.
